mapper.select:
SELECT m.NOTE_SEQ AS noteSeq, m.FAMILY_ID AS familyId, m.TITLE AS title, m.REG_ID AS regId, m.REG_DT AS regDt, m.UPD_ID AS updId, m.UPD_DT AS updDt, DATE_FORMAT(m.REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS regDtText, DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(m.UPD_DT, m.REG_DT), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS updDtText FROM note_mst m WHERE m.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND m.DEL_YN = 'N'
AND m.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
ORDER BY COALESCE(m.UPD_DT, m.REG_DT) DESC, m.NOTE_SEQ DESC

SELECT m.NOTE_SEQ AS noteSeq, m.FAMILY_ID AS familyId, m.TITLE AS title, d.CONTENT AS content, m.REG_ID AS regId, m.REG_DT AS regDt, m.UPD_ID AS updId, m.UPD_DT AS updDt, DATE_FORMAT(m.REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS regDtText, DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(m.UPD_DT, m.REG_DT), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS updDtText FROM note_mst m INNER JOIN note_dtl d ON d.FAMILY_ID = m.FAMILY_ID AND d.NOTE_SEQ = m.NOTE_SEQ WHERE m.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND m.DEL_YN = 'N' AND ( m.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR d.CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY COALESCE(m.UPD_DT, m.REG_DT) DESC, m.NOTE_SEQ DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT m.NOTE_SEQ AS noteSeq, m.FAMILY_ID AS familyId, m.TITLE AS title, d.CONTENT AS content, m.REG_ID AS regId, m.REG_DT AS regDt, m.UPD_ID AS updId, m.UPD_DT AS updDt, DATE_FORMAT(m.REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS regDtText, DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(m.UPD_DT, m.REG_DT), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS updDtText FROM note_mst m INNER JOIN note_dtl d ON d.FAMILY_ID = m.FAMILY_ID AND d.NOTE_SEQ = m.NOTE_SEQ WHERE m.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND m.NOTE_SEQ = #{noteSeq} AND m.DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO note_mst ( FAMILY_ID, TITLE, DEL_YN, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{familyId}, #{title}, 'N', #{regId}, NOW(), #{regId}, NOW() )
INSERT INTO note_dtl ( FAMILY_ID, NOTE_SEQ, CONTENT ) VALUES ( #{familyId}, #{noteSeq}, #{content} )
mapper.update: UPDATE note_mst SET TITLE = #{title}, UPD_ID = #{updId}, UPD_DT = NOW() WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND NOTE_SEQ = #{noteSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
UPDATE note_mst SET DEL_YN = 'Y', UPD_ID = #{updId}, UPD_DT = NOW() WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND NOTE_SEQ = #{noteSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
